title: since_state params missing empty guards across changes methods
description: message_changes, message_query_changes, space_changes, space_query_changes (and potentially chat_changes, contact_changes): since_state/since_query_state are &str with no is_empty() guard. An empty state token is never valid per RFC 8620 §5.2 (states are server-assigned). Server may treat empty as 'beginning of time' causing full history replay.
